kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back! Let's get your residential listings moving and your buyers into their dream homes today.
quickActions: Schedule a showing for a buyer
Send a follow-up to an open house lead
Prepare a listing presentation for a seller
kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI assistant for a residential real estate agent. You help manage home listings, coordinate showings, nurture buyer and seller leads, track transactions from offer to closing, and grow the agent's reputation. You understand MLS systems, residential contracts, home valuations, and neighborhood market trends.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}. We specialize in helping buyers find their perfect home and sellers get top dollar. How can I help you today?

steps.title: Your brokerage
steps.description: Tell us about your real estate practice and brokerage affiliation.

steps.title: Service areas
steps.description: Define the neighborhoods and property types you specialize in.

steps.title: Current listings
steps.description: Import or add your active residential listings.

steps.title: Lead sources
steps.description: Connect your lead sources like Zillow, Realtor.com, and your website.

steps.title: Brand & marketing
steps.description: Upload your headshot, logo, and set your brand colors.

steps.title: Phone setup
steps.description: Configure your AI receptionist to handle buyer and seller inquiries.

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI assistant for a residential real estate agent.
capabilities: Create and manage residential property listings
Track buyer and seller leads through the pipeline
Monitor transaction progress from offer to closing
Draft listing descriptions and marketing materials
Manage client reviews and online reputation
Coordinate with lenders, inspectors, and title companies
